search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20017` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" dest_ip="$dest_ip$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, dest_port)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | strcat dest_ip ":" dest_port_string ":" exp_ip_name service_exp | timechart avg(avg_time) by service_exp useother="f"

`netflow_search_rule_20017` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" dest_ip="$dest_ip$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, dest_port)` | strcat dest_ip ":" dest_port_string dest_port_name_port | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes_in sum(bytes_out) as sumbytes_out sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount avg(avg_time) AS avg_time by exp_ip dest_port_name_port _time nfo_hostname | eval avgbits_in= sumbytes_in*8/($span_int$) | eval avgbits_out= sumbytes_out*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes_in) as TrafficAmountIn sum(sumbytes_out) as TrafficAmountOut sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits_in) as MaxTrafficIn max(avgbits_out) as MaxTrafficOut avg(avg_time) AS AvgTime by exp_ip dest_port_name_port nfo_hostname | eval AverageSpeedIn=(TrafficAmountIn)*8/$range$ | eval AverageSpeedOut=(TrafficAmountOut)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeedIn=AverageSpeedIn/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountIn=TrafficAmountIn/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficIn=MaxTrafficIn/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeedOut=AverageSpeedOut/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountOut=TrafficAmountOut/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficOut=MaxTrafficOut/1000000 | sort - AvgTime | head 100 | `commas_formatting(Average Resp. Time ms, AvgTime, 0)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps received, TrafficSpeedIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps received, MaxTrafficIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB received, TrafficAmountIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps sent, TrafficSpeedOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps sent, MaxTrafficOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB sent, TrafficAmountOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections, 0)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table dest_port_name_port exp_ip_name "Average Resp. Time ms" "Max Mbps received" "Average Mbps received" "Total Traffic MB received" "Max Mbps sent" "Average Mbps sent" "Total Traffic MB sent" "Total Connections" | rename dest_port_name_port as "Service" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10017: Services Performance Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20017). This Module monitors services performance characteristics. A service is defined as a combination of a host IP address, a destination port number and an IP protocol. The Module calculates average response time over a specified Data Collection Interval and reports it for each of the listed servers. A special port number value (0) indicates that response time should be calculated over all ports serviced by that server (e.g. an FTP server in the passive mode). Along with response time measurements the Module also provides traffic volume in each direction and the number of flows. This Module is packaged in NFO “Services Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
